chapter_title.en: The Rights of Allah against oneself

text: وَأَمَّا حَقُّ بَصَرِكَ أن تُغْمِضَهُ عَمَّا لا يَحِلُّ لَكَ و تَعْتَبِر بالنَّظَرِ بِهِ.

en.william-c-chittick: The right of sight is that you lower it before everything which is unlawful to you and that you take heed whenever you look at anything. [1]
